Params: {1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png'}
{3: 'Blackness. An infinite black.'}
{3: 'Not a deep darkness, but a flat void.'}
{3: 'Vast yet constricting, suffocating, as if she has been compressed into a single plane of existence.'}
{3: 'Why are you here?'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiStoryMovieFilm.prefab', 2: '2'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory17.jpg'}
{2: '??', 3: 'Is this where you work now?', 4: '1'}
{2: '??', 3: 'You haven\'t answered me yet, Teddy...', 4: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory895.jpg'}
{2: '??', 3: 'Am I the one going crazy or is it you, my dear Victoria?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiStoryMovieFilm.prefab'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory0.png'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryZhengyanNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory936.png'}
{3: '"Why am I here?" This is her first coherent thought, surfacing through the drowsiness.'}
{3: 'The second: a chill. The heat is leaching from her body, the last traces of condensation liquid evaporating from her synthetic skin.'}
{3: 'She looks behind her. On the polyester bedsheet, a faint, human-shaped outline of moisture is all that remains of her dream.'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory936.png', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory936.png'}
{3: 'To her right is a bed-length window fitted with one-way glass.'}
{3: 'Beyond it, a hazy, depthless sky makes time unreadable. In the distance, skyscrapers pierce the gloom, their lights glowing like a vast, dormant circuit board.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Teddy', 3: 'What am I even thinking...', 4: '1'}
{3: 'To the left, a trail of chaos leads from the doorway to her bed: boots, socks, jacket, shirt, gloves, shorts—the debris of a young woman\'s life too hastily lived.'}
{3: 'The bedside clock glows 5:12 AM.'}
{3: 'After yesterday\'s brutal workload and barely two hours of rest, even her Construct body is protesting. She shakes her head, trying to quell the storm in her M.I.N.D.'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory936.png', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory936.png'}
{3: 'Enduring the dull throb behind her eyes, she pushes herself up, strips the bed, and feeds the sheet into the waiting laundry machine.'}
{3: 'She slides down the wall, folding into herself, head buried in her arms. The laundry machine\'s gentle hum is the room\'s only heartbeat.'}
{3: 'Silence stretches as time passes.'}
{3: 'After a long while, the vacuum robot whirs to life on its schedule, bumping against her leg. It retreats, advances, retreats again—a mindless dance of confusion.'}
{3: 'Teddy reaches out without looking and nudges it onto a new path.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Which idiot programmed this thing...', 4: '1'}
{3: 'She stands. Her own reflection waits for her in the full-length mirror across the room. She approaches, studying the young woman who studies her back.'}
{3: 'She raises a hand; the reflection mimics perfectly. She tilts her head; it tilts in unison. She clenches a fist, then opens it; the motion is fluid, absolute.'}
{3: 'Her control over the vessel is precise, undeniable.'}
{3: 'She reaches out, her fingertips meeting the cool, hard surface of the glass. Slowly, the chill of the mirror begins to bleed away, warming to her touch.'}
{3: 'She pulls her hand back. A faint, ghostly print of her palm lingers on the surface before slowly fading into nothing.'}
{3: 'The world\'s responses are exact. Undeniable.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory519.png'}
{1: 'Criminal Investigation Bureau', 2: 'Elysium Central Building', 4: '25F'}
{2: 'Elysium Central Building, 25th Floor, Crime Investigation Bureau.'}
{3: 'Inside a stark white psychological evaluation room.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Evaluation System', 3: 'What does it feel like to reunite with a friend? Download.'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Download.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Evaluation System', 3: 'Do you feel distress when you see dead bodies? Download.'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Download.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Evaluation System', 3: 'Do you feel warmth when reuniting with family? Upload.'}
{2: 'Evaluation System', 3: 'What does it feel like to live with your parents? Upload.'}
{2: 'Evaluation System', 3: 'Do you often feel surrounded by darkness? Touch.'}
{2: 'Evaluation System', 3: 'A sealed room.'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'A sealed room.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Evaluation System', 3: 'Operating table.'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Operating table.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Evaluation System', 3: 'A flying sparrow.'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'A flying sparrow.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Evaluation System', 3: 'Your M.I.N.D. is experiencing minor disruption, but remains within normal parameters. Please ensure you take your mandated rest, Inspector.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1316.jpg'}
{3: 'Teddy walks out of the psychological evaluation room, pressing fingers to her brow.'}
{3: 'Teddy turns around to find Moineau leaning against the wall, her face etched with pure exhaustion.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Teddy', 3: 'And here I thought I was the one who looked tired.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Moineau', 3: 'That\'s what happens when you have me digging into Rokubishi Electric all night.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Moineau', 3: 'Care to guess what I found?', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Just spit it out.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Moineau', 3: 'The CEO is having a steamy affair with an employee.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Moineau', 3: 'Can\'t take a joke. Fine.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Moineau', 3: 'I didn\'t find a single thing.', 4: '2'}
{3: 'Her expression hardens, her voice dropping to a more serious tone.'}
{2: 'Moineau', 3: 'Absolutely nothing.', 4: '2'}
{3: 'Teddy raises an eyebrow.'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Even you came up empty?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Moineau', 3: 'I hacked their servers, inventory, executive PCs, company emails...', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Moineau', 3: 'Every possible source.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Moineau', 3: 'With what I\'ve gathered, I could start my own Rokubishi Electric.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Unless you\'re dealing with someone out of your league.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'But that\'s highly unlikely.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Moineau', 3: 'Even then, I\'d find traces of the intrusion. But there\'s no evidence that the system was ever hacked.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'A dead end, huh... Tsk.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'A familiar throb pulses deep within Teddy\'s M.I.N.D.'}
{2: 'Moineau', 3: 'So, Teddy, you haven\'t answered me yet.', 4: '2'}
{1: 'DialogShake'}
{3: 'Moineau blinks, taken aback by Teddy\'s sharp reaction.'}
{2: 'Moineau', 3: 'I was asking about your psych eval.', 4: '2'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '2'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStoryFront/BgStoryFront39.png', 4: '4'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory519.png'}

{3: 'Per Bureau protocol, every inspector assigned to a homicide must complete two psychological evaluations: one to initiate an investigation, and a second to close it, ensuring the mental fitness of its field personnel throughout the process.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStoryFront/BgStoryFront39.png', 4: '4', 5: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '2'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1316.jpg'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Nothing serious. A bit disrupted, but still within parameters.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Moineau', 3: 'Fair enough. With a victim like that... it would get to anyone.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Moineau', 3: 'Do you think your frame data was leaked?', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'All the better. Then I could just arrest you and call it a day.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'As far as I\'m concerned, you\'re the only person who could steal my frame data without a trace.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Moineau plucks a disposable electrolytic vape from a pocket. She brings it to her lips, and the device\'s red tip flares like a warning light as she takes a long, deliberate drag.'}
{3: 'She exhales a slow, curling plume of vapor. Through the dissipating haze, her gaze rests on Teddy—now veiled, unreadable.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Moineau', 3: 'What was with you earlier?', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: '...Just reminded me of something.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Moineau', 3: 'What did you say?', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Last night... I dreamed of Leonardo. He said something similar to what you just said.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Moineau', 3: 'Your brother, huh...', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Moineau', 3: 'How long has it been since the falling incident?', 4: '2'}
{3: 'Moineau takes another deep drag from her electrolytic vape and opens her mouth to speak.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Moore', 3: 'Ah, there you two are. The Chief wants to see us.', 4: '18'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory414.jpg'}
{1: 'Bureau Chief\'s Office', 2: 'Elysium Central Building', 4: '26F'}
{2: 'Elysium Central Building, 26th Floor, Chief\'s Office.'}
{3: 'Chief James is hunched over two physical paper reports when Teddy, Moineau, and Moore enter his office.'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory414.jpg', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory414.jpg'}

{1: '1', 3: 'He is the picture of efficiency: a sharp side-parted crop of hair, rectangular glasses, a precise mustache, and the unmistakable contours of a dedicated gym-goer beneath his dress shirt.'}
{3: 'One might also wonder if he has a wealthy friend who dresses up in a bat costume after hours.'}
{3: 'But today, that efficiency is marred by a cloud of palpable concern.'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory414.jpg', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory414.jpg'}
{3: 'Without a word, Moineau and Teddy head for the couch and make themselves comfortable, a practiced act of casual defiance.'}
{3: 'James\' lip twitches. He visibly chooses the path of least resistance—out of sight, out of mind—and pivots his full, weary attention to Moore, the one who remains standing.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Chief James', 3: 'I\'ve reviewed the reports.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Chief James', 3: 'What\'s your assessment of those rioting machines?', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Moineau stretches lazily before responding.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Moineau', 3: 'No leads from Rokubishi Electric. They haven\'t reported any missing inventory.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Chief James', 3: 'There should be production serial numbers on the remains? Did anyone check those?', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Teddy cuts in.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Didn\'t find the serial number on that one. Someone might\'ve erased it.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Chief James', 3: 'The Arclight Avenue attack, the dock sewer disappearance... Both involve rioting machines, and evidence from the apartment victim points toward the sewers...', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Chief James', 3: 'I\'m approving Moore\'s request to merge the investigations.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Chief James', 3: 'Christina. You can step away from this. Investigating a victim who mirrors your frame... we would all understand.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Teddy', 3: 'No. I\'m staying on the case.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Chief James', 3: 'Moore, you can also step away. Focus on recovering from your injuries.', 4: '1'}
{1: 'DialogEnable'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Moore', 3: 'That\'s not necessary, Chief! My injuries aren\'t serious; this is nothing for a Construct!', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Chief James', 3: '...Are you sure about that?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Chief James', 3: 'Then it\'s settled. The three of you will form the investigation team. If there\'s nothing else, you\'re dismissed.', 4: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1316.jpg'}
{3: 'The three of them file out of the Chief\'s office.'}
{3: 'After a moment\'s hesitation, Moore decides to speak up.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Moore', 3: 'I\'ve been meaning to ask... do you two have some kind of issue with the Chief?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Moore', 3: 'There\'s absolutely no respect for authority here. None whatsoever.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Moineau', 3: 'Not everyone loves their job as much as you do... But that doesn\'t mean we don\'t take our cases seriously.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Moineau', 3: 'I don\'t really care about things like salary or job titles.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Moineau', 3: 'As for Teddy, she just has an allergy to rules and red tape.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Moore', 3: 'That\'s... quite the carefree outlook.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Let\'s focus on the cases. We\'ve hit a wall with the rioting machines.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'I suggest we pivot back to the victim.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'As the conversation turns to the cases, Moore\'s tone grows serious.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Moore', 3: 'So we start by investigating the victim\'s history and personal connections.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Moore', 3: 'I was planning the same. Jack was only classified as missing before, which limited our access to his private data. I\'ll do a full background dive.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Moore', 3: 'Did you find anything on that storage chip from last night?', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Moineau', 3: 'What\'s the problem?', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'I\'m not sure, but... some of the data doesn\'t add up.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Import-export volumes, GDP... In plain words, the city is consuming far more resources than it\'s paying for.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'It\'s like a mysterious benefactor is supplying the city out of thin air.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Could other regions be funding us?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Moineau', 3: 'No idea. That\'s well above our pay grade anyway.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Moineau', 3: 'If people start thinking the world isn\'t real over something like this, they have way too much time on their hands.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Moineau', 3: 'They should try painting or writing instead. Once they\'re suffering through the creative process, they won\'t have the bandwidth for these theories.', 4: '2'}
{1: 'AniZhuanchangEnd'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1316.jpg'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1368.jpg', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1368.jpg'}

{3: 'The trio continues their discussion, their footsteps echoing as they move from the Chief\'s office toward the 25th-floor reception hall—a perplexing extravagance for a bureau dedicated to crime investigation. As they enter the inspectors\' office area, a soft chime sounds from Moore\'s terminal.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'He glances at the message, and his face instantly breaks into a radiant, unguarded smile.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Whoa... That smile is genuinely disturbing, old man.', 4: '18'}
{2: 'Moore', 3: 'I am not old enough to be called "old man"!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Moore', 3: 'Besides, you two wouldn\'t understand the joy of getting a message from your wife!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Moore', 3: 'That\'s the kind of thing that drives mature, dependable men to face life head-on!', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Moineau', 3: '"Old man" is a state of mind. And that speech just proved our point.', 4: '18'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiStoryBlackPassScene.prefab', 2: '3'}
{2: 'Moore', 3: 'Anyway, to thank you both for your help earlier, how about coming over to my place for dinner tonight?', 4: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory423.jpg', 2: '1'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Without waiting for a response, Moore is already calling Elean.'}
{2: 'Moore', 3: 'Elean, could you prepare some extra food for tonight?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Moore', 3: 'I\'m inviting two colleagues over. Right, the ones who helped me before. Moineau and Teddy.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Moore', 3: 'Yeah, the famous one from our bureau, you know.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Elean', 3: 'Isn\'t this a bit too rushed...?', 4: '11'}
{2: 'Moore', 3: 'Don\'t worry about it! It\'s totally fine!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Moore', 3: 'That settles it then. I\'ll see you later.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'He ends the call.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Teddy', 3: 'Wow. Unilaterally deciding our evening. We never actually agreed...', 4: '1'}
{1: 'DialogEnable'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Moore', 3: 'Don\'t tell me you\'re going to turn me down?', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Moore', 3: 'Your colleague will weep. Our friendship will shatter.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Teddy', 3: 'That\'s totally an "old man" act...', 4: '1'}
